note: Curated ALLOWLIST (fail-closed). Every story claim cites a real institutional-memory record by full-40-hex git blob sha. scripts/verify-evidence.mjs asserts each blob_sha == the current git blob sha; drift FAILS the build. Quotes are verbatim excerpts of the cited record.

entries.quote: The Iliad is the quest a new system undertakes to become enrolled. Presence in the repository is NOT enrollment; enrollment is earned by completing the quest.
AI-START-HERE — the entry point a model reads to orient itself before it is permitted to change the system.

Convergence and authorization are NOT correctness. A plan can survive 10 adversarial rounds + a signed council and still not correspond to reality — because reviewers judge the plan on its own terms; only contact with ground truth tests correspondence. The gates test defensibility, not truth.
AUTHORIZED — Argo implementation of the Lachesis cycle-1 matured plan is authorized by the signed council under the TELOS gate. Enrollment-flip HELD for a separate Eye ruling.

The plan survived 10 adversarial Daedalus rounds AND a 5-seat signed council, and STILL carried a wrong model of its input — because no reviewer re-derived the actual snapshot format. Contact with ground truth at implementation time is what caught it.

The adversary is not infallible either. codex re-raised a false HEX64/terminator finding; verifying it empirically (rather than implementing on its say-so) is the same discipline applied to the reviewer.

What Lachesis does NOT do or establish. These are honest limits, several IRREDUCIBLE without crossing the frozen boundary — recorded rather than papered over. A shortcut hides what wasn't done; a bounded scope records it.
